meanings.iching.hexagram.1: Qian, the Creative: vigorous, initiating force whose sustained effort brings great success when guided by integrity.
meanings.iching.hexagram.2: Kun, the Receptive: yielding, nurturing devotion that prospers by following rather than leading.
meanings.iching.hexagram.3: Zhun, Difficulty at the Beginning: a chaotic start that rewards patience, steady help and careful first steps.
meanings.iching.hexagram.4: Meng, Youthful Folly: inexperience that grows through humble, sincere seeking of guidance.
meanings.iching.hexagram.5: Xu, Waiting: confident patience that bides its time until the right moment arrives.
meanings.iching.hexagram.6: Song, Conflict: a dispute best met with caution and compromise rather than stubborn pursuit.
meanings.iching.hexagram.7: Shi, the Army: collective effort that succeeds under disciplined, principled leadership.
meanings.iching.hexagram.8: Bi, Holding Together: union and alliance founded on sincerity and timely commitment.
meanings.iching.hexagram.9: Xiaoxu, the Taming Power of the Small: gentle, gradual restraint that gathers strength through small influences.
meanings.iching.hexagram.10: Lv, Treading: careful conduct that advances safely by treading with courtesy even amid danger.
meanings.iching.hexagram.11: Tai, Peace: harmonious flourishing as heaven and earth meet in fruitful balance.
meanings.iching.hexagram.12: Pi, Standstill: a time of stagnation and obstruction when withdrawal preserves integrity.
meanings.iching.hexagram.13: Tongren, Fellowship with Men: open, impartial cooperation that unites people for shared purpose.
meanings.iching.hexagram.14: Dayou, Possession in Great Measure: abundant fortune held wisely through modesty and generosity.
meanings.iching.hexagram.15: Qian, Modesty: humble restraint that earns lasting respect and brings things to completion.
meanings.iching.hexagram.16: Yu, Enthusiasm: inspired, joyful momentum that mobilises others towards a common aim.
meanings.iching.hexagram.17: Sui, Following: adaptable allegiance that prospers by following what is right at the right time.
meanings.iching.hexagram.18: Gu, Work on What Has Been Spoiled: the diligent task of repairing decay and renewing what has fallen into neglect.
meanings.iching.hexagram.19: Lin, Approach: a rising, favourable influence that should be used while its season lasts.
meanings.iching.hexagram.20: Guan, Contemplation: thoughtful observation that brings clarity and sets an example for others.
meanings.iching.hexagram.21: Shike, Biting Through: decisive action that removes an obstacle through firm, just resolution.
meanings.iching.hexagram.22: Bi, Grace: refined, graceful form that adorns matters yet must rest on genuine substance.
meanings.iching.hexagram.23: Bo, Splitting Apart: a time of decline when one yields, waits and avoids futile resistance.
meanings.iching.hexagram.24: Fu, Return: the turning point at which light renews itself and natural recovery begins.
meanings.iching.hexagram.25: Wuwang, Innocence: spontaneous, sincere action aligned with nature that prospers without calculation.
meanings.iching.hexagram.26: Daxu, the Taming Power of the Great: accumulated strength held in reserve until released for great undertakings.
meanings.iching.hexagram.27: Yi, Nourishment: mindful care for what one takes in and provides, in body, mind and words.
meanings.iching.hexagram.28: Daguo, Preponderance of the Great: an overloaded, critical moment demanding bold, decisive measures.
meanings.iching.hexagram.29: Kan, the Abysmal: repeated danger to be met with sincerity, steadiness and inner confidence.
meanings.iching.hexagram.30: Li, the Clinging: clarity and dependence that flourish when one holds to what is right.
meanings.iching.hexagram.31: Xian, Influence: mutual attraction and sensitive responsiveness that draw people together.
meanings.iching.hexagram.32: Heng, Duration: enduring constancy that succeeds through perseverance and steady purpose.
meanings.iching.hexagram.33: Dun, Retreat: a strategic, dignified withdrawal that turns timely retreat into advantage.
meanings.iching.hexagram.34: Dazhuang, the Power of the Great: vigorous strength that must be tempered by righteousness to avoid excess.
meanings.iching.hexagram.35: Jin, Progress: bright, steady advancement and recognition during a favourable rise.
meanings.iching.hexagram.36: Mingyi, Darkening of the Light: a hostile time when one veils one's brilliance and perseveres quietly.
meanings.iching.hexagram.37: Jiaren, the Family: harmony achieved through each member keeping to their proper role.
meanings.iching.hexagram.38: Kui, Opposition: division and misunderstanding where small reconciliations restore common ground.
meanings.iching.hexagram.39: Jian, Obstruction: an obstacle best overcome by pausing, reflecting and seeking allies.
meanings.iching.hexagram.40: Jie, Deliverance: release from tension and difficulty, freeing one to move forward.
meanings.iching.hexagram.41: Sun, Decrease: a deliberate scaling-back that brings gain through sincere simplicity.
meanings.iching.hexagram.42: Yi, Increase: a favourable time of growth and generosity that benefits all when shared.
meanings.iching.hexagram.43: Guai, Breakthrough: a resolute, open decision to clear away what is corrupt without rashness.
meanings.iching.hexagram.44: Gou, Coming to Meet: a subtle, tempting encounter that calls for vigilance before it spreads.
meanings.iching.hexagram.45: Cui, Gathering Together: people drawn into unity around a worthy centre and shared devotion.
meanings.iching.hexagram.46: Sheng, Pushing Upward: gradual, effortful ascent that rises to success through persistent growth.
meanings.iching.hexagram.47: Kun, Oppression: a time of hardship and constraint endured with inner cheerfulness and integrity.
meanings.iching.hexagram.48: Jing, the Well: a steady, inexhaustible source that nourishes all who draw upon it.
meanings.iching.hexagram.49: Ge, Revolution: necessary, well-timed change carried out so that people come to trust it.
meanings.iching.hexagram.50: Ding, the Cauldron: cultivation and nourishment that transform raw matter into something refined.
meanings.iching.hexagram.51: Zhen, the Arousing: a sudden shock that startles yet ultimately brings renewal and composure.
meanings.iching.hexagram.52: Gen, Keeping Still: calm stillness and inner quiet that bring clarity by knowing when to stop.
meanings.iching.hexagram.53: Jian, Development: gradual, orderly progress that endures because it advances step by step.
meanings.iching.hexagram.54: Guimei, the Marrying Maiden: a subordinate or irregular union that requires tact and awareness of one's place.
meanings.iching.hexagram.55: Feng, Abundance: a peak of fullness and brightness to be enjoyed while mindful of its decline.
meanings.iching.hexagram.56: Lv, the Wanderer: a transient, unsettled situation in which caution and modesty keep one safe.
meanings.iching.hexagram.57: Xun, the Gentle: penetrating, persistent influence that succeeds through gentle, consistent action.
meanings.iching.hexagram.58: Dui, the Joyous: genuine, shared joy that strengthens bonds when grounded in sincerity.
meanings.iching.hexagram.59: Huan, Dispersion: the dissolving of rigidity and division that restores flow and reunion.
meanings.iching.hexagram.60: Jie, Limitation: sensible boundaries and moderation that bring order without harsh restriction.
meanings.iching.hexagram.61: Zhongfu, Inner Truth: sincere conviction that persuades and connects through genuine trust.
meanings.iching.hexagram.62: Xiaoguo, Preponderance of the Small: a time for modest, careful acts rather than grand ambitions.
meanings.iching.hexagram.63: Jiji, After Completion: a fulfilled order that must be guarded vigilantly against gradual decline.
meanings.iching.hexagram.64: Weiji, Before Completion: a transition near its goal that succeeds through careful, well-judged final steps.
